title: J. M. Smucker: A Low Hurdle For Acceptable Returns
text: J. M. Smucker is a Dividend Champion with 25 consecutive years of dividend growth. Shares currently yield 3.08%.

title: A Sweet Time To Buy The J.M. Smucker Company
text: The J.M. Smucker Company (NYSE: SJM) had a great FQ3 but one thing is clear and it is weighing on share prices. The supply chain and inflationary disruptions are impacting FQ4 results, the current quarter, and the company guided the market lower because of it.

title: The J.M. Smucker (SJM) Q3 Earnings Beat Estimates, Sales Down
text: The J.M. Smucker's (SJM) third-quarter fiscal 2022 results reflect lower earnings and sales amid rising costs environment and supply chain disruptions.

title: The J. M. Smucker Company (SJM) CEO Mark Smucker on Q3 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: The J. M. Smucker Company (SJM) CEO Mark Smucker on Q3 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript

title: Why Are J M Smucker Shares Trading Lower Today
text: J M Smucker Co (NYSE: SJM) reported a third-quarter FY21 sales decline of 1% year-on-year, to $2.06 billion, beating the consensus of $2.04 billion. Organic net sales growth was 4%.

title: Smucker (SJM) Beats Q3 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Smucker (SJM) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 12.02% and 0.24%, respectively, for the quarter ended January 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: JM Smucker Q3 earnings top estimates but company lowers guidance to reflect inflationary and supply chain issues
text: The J.M. Smucker Co. SJM, -1.84% posted stronger-than-expected earnings for its sical third quarter on Tuesday, but lowered guidance to reflect continued supply chain issues and inflationary pressure. Orrville, Ohio-based Smucker posted net income of $69.7 million, or $64 cents a share, for the quarter to Jan. 31, down 73% from $261.5 million, or $2.32 a share, in the year-earlier period.
